item.title: 1961 Kay K5965 Pro Howlin' Wolf Vintage Hollowbody Bass Guitar Sunburst, 100% Original w/ Case, K162 — $2,899.99
item.description:
$2,899.99 · Excellent · Mike & Mike's Guitar Bar

Up for sale, a 1961 Kay “Howlin’ Wolf” K5965 Pro bass in excellent, 100% original condition and in perfect working order, complete with the original chipboard case. At the time of introduction of Leo Fender’s Precision Bass in 1951, Kay was the preeminent manufacturer of commercial-grade upright basses; as such, they (correctly) viewed the new electric market as both competition and opportunity, quickly becoming the second commercially successful electric bass manufacturer, with their own electric design hitting the market less than a year later. This K5965 is the direct descendant of that original Kay Electric Bass, featuring hollowbody construction, a single blade pickup, 30 1/2“ scale length, and a golden gloss Sunburst finish highlighting the curly maple figuring on the top and back.

Featuring a 15" wide fully hollow flame maple body paired with a maple neck and thick slab Brazilian rosewood fretboard, this traditional tonewood complement offers excellent note attack and fullness. The blade neck pickup delivers pillowy warmth and woody upper midrange, and the tone stays crisp with good definition when the Tone knob is rolled back. Playing near the bridge yields a tic-tac top end, and there’s a surprising amount of cut and brightness to the sound, far more so than typically afforded a fully hollow, neck pickup-equipped instrument. This K5965 Pro weighs 7lb 2oz, professionally setup here at Mike & Mike’s Guitar Bar with 45-100 flatwound strings, easy-playing action, and accurate intonation.

Neck Specs:

  • Wood: Maple
  • Shape: Deep soft V, measuring 1.110” 1st fret, 1.225” 9th fret
  • Fretboard: Brazilian rosewood slab, 10” radius
  • Frets: Medium, no wear
  • Scale Length: 30 1/2”
  • Nut: 1 1/2”, bone
  • Tuners: Kluson waffleback
  • Headstock: Tortoise veneer, metal Kay badge

Body Specs:

  • Wood: Flame maple
  • Pickups: Blade single coil
  • Controls: Volume, Tone
  • Harness: Untouched solder, CTS and Stackpole pots date to 1960 and 1961
  • Hardware: Brazilian rosewood bridge, trapeze tailpiece
  • Plastics: “Cupcake” knobs

The gloss golden shaded Sunburst finish highlights the tight curly ripples of figuring in the maple, with one small area of vertical checking on the bass side on top. Cosmetic wear is limited to some faint buckle scuffing across the back, minor pick wear on top, and a few dings on the rest of the body. The gloss on the neck profile is smooth and clean.

The original two-tone chipboard case is included and equally as clean as the bass with functional latches and the original handle.

item.title: 【new】Freedom Custom Guitar Research / O.S.R.S.PJ 5st C.O.Burgundy Mist 4.250kg #1974L【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 【new】Freedom Custom Guitar Research / O.S.R.S.PJ 5st C.O.Burgundy Mist 4.250kg #1974L【GIB横浜】エレキベース — $6,135
item.description:
$6,135 · Brand New · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Freedom is a Tokyo-based guitar workshop that enjoys overwhelming support from professional musicians in Japan, and in recent years, its name has begun to resonate overseas.


Originally highly regarded for its repair work, the workshop now focuses on manufacturing, and its creations are loved by many musicians for their high quality and rational design sense.


All basses from this brand are manufactured in Tokyo.


Through strict quality control, the wood used is carefully selected, and any wood that does not meet the standards is not used in the products.


This level of quality control is possible precisely because it is a small workshop.


In that sense, the quality is fundamentally different from that of products made in large factories.


This model is a PJ model specially ordered from GIB.


What is particularly noteworthy is its supreme playability and the sound that musicians truly desire in a PJ.


The neck, carefully crafted using stainless steel frets while respecting Fender's conventions, is truly top-notch.


While it doesn't have a particularly unique shape, that's precisely why its basic quality stands out. The sharp response, speedy and wide-range sound contributes to its high playability.


A major issue with PJ basses is the unique sound when mixed; this may be something PJ enthusiasts are already accepting.


The strangely distorted phase nuance can sometimes be negative.


Few brands have their own solutions for this balance, but Freedom has one.


For the P pickup, the balance between the number of turns and wire length is adjusted by using a dummy pole piece for one of the 3rd strings.


For the J pickup, the shielding is higher than usual to maintain a refined balance when mixed.


This is very rational for PJ-style basses, where noise cancellation in the mix is ​​not possible.


The color is a sophisticated burgundy, finished with lacquer.


The more you play it, the more the sound and appearance will change.


Personally, I don't think one is superior to the other between lacquer and urethane, but I requested a lacquer finish with the hope that you would enjoy the changes and cherish it for a long time. Few brands can produce a 5-string PJ bass of this quality.


That's why so many working musicians use it.


A masterpiece that combines the PJ style with the timeless value of Fender.


Highly recommended without reservation.


SPECS


BODY: Alder 2pc

NECK: Maple, 34in Scale

GRIP: FCGR U

F. BOARD: Indian Rosewood (340R)


NUT: Silicone Oiled Bone


FRET: FCGR Eternal Fret 014WARM / 20F

FINISH: C.O. Burgundy Mist / MH (N.C. Lacquer)

PICKUP: (N) FCGR Original 5st. PB / (B) FCGR Original 5st. JB (19mm Pitch)


Delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.


Accessories: Gig bag, spec sheet


Text: Ryoma Terao


Inspection 담당: Higashie


Product photos: Tei


Manufacturer's warranty included


● Up to 15% OFF with trade-in


When purchasing, you will receive a 10% discount on the sales price when you use our trade-in service. (Consignment items are excluded. Applicable only if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the sales price.)


Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.


◯ GIB, TONIQ Warranty


● Lifetime Free Maintenance


Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free ""string vibration setup"" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)


・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.


・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.


・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.



● Guaranteed Buyback Price


If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee a buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.


● Warranty Against Defects


Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. Excluding some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.


The warranty period is 3 months for used items and 1 year for new items.


Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:


* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.


* Replacement of consumables.


* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.


* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.


* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by parties other than our company.


* If the warranty card does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in. Or, if the text has been altered.


* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.


(Warranty is only valid for purchases made within Japan.)


We ship with sufficient packaging.


We also ship internationally.



●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee

Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.


If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.


Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.

Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: Ibanez BTB770PB-AM Standard 2009 - 2010 - Amber — $843.24
item.description:
$843.24 · Excellent · Alimtbbrs

Up for sale is a stunning, discontinued Ibanez BTB770PB-AM 4-string electric bass in an absolutely gorgeous Amber (AM) finish. This specific model was only produced between 2009 and 2010, making it a highly sought-after find for players who love the premium, heavy-duty boutique styling of the BTB line but prefer a traditional 4-string layout.

​This bass features a striking Poplar Burl top over a mahogany wing body, paired with a massive-sustaining 5-piece Maple/Bubinga neck-through-body construction.

​It is in perfect condition—immaculately clean, with no notable dings, deep scratches, or hardware tarnish. The electronics are fully functional, the neck is perfectly straight, and it plays beautifully across all 24 frets.

​Comes bundled with a perfectly fitting heavy-duty hardshell case.

​Key Features & Specifications

​Model: BTB770PB-AM (Standard Line, 2009–2010)

​Finish: Amber (AM) with a highly figured Poplar Burl top

​Construction: 5-piece Maple/Bubinga Neck-Through

​Scale Length: 34" / 864mm

​Fretboard: Rosewood with premium Pearl Abalone off-center dot inlays

​Frets: 24 Medium frets

​Pickups: Factory dual Bartolini MK2-4 active humbuckers

​Electronics: Bartolini MK2 3-Band active EQ (requires two 9V batteries for an 18V high-headroom circuit)

​Controls: Volume, Balancer, Bass Boost/Cut, Mid Boost/Cut, Treble Boost/Cut

​Hardware: Cosmo Black with an MR-2 bridge (19mm string spacing)

​Output Jack: Secure ¼" Neutrik stereo locking jack

​Included Accessories: Fitted hardshell case

​Condition Notes

​Body/Neck: Mint / Perfect. Free of standard gig wear, major buckle rash, or tip dings on the horns.

​Electronics: Clean pots, strong output, no static, and zero battery terminal corrosion.

​Playability: Low action, excellent sustain, and plenty of fret life remaining.

​Shipping & Details

​The bass will be packed securely inside its hard case, detuned slightly for safety during transit, and shipped out promptly with full tracking and insurance.

​Feel free to message me with any questions or if you want additional photos of specific angles!

item.title: 【new】Freedom Custom Guitar Research / O.S.R.S.PB C.O.Pink 3.920kg #1975【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $4,823
item.description:
$4,823 · Brand New · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Freedom is a Tokyo-based guitar workshop that enjoys overwhelming support from professional musicians in Japan, and in recent years, its name has begun to resonate overseas.


Originally highly regarded for its repair work, the workshop now focuses on manufacturing, and its creations are loved by many musicians for their high quality and rational design sense.


All basses from this brand are manufactured in Tokyo.


Through strict quality control, the wood used is carefully selected, and any wood that does not meet the standards is not used in the products.


This level of quality control is possible precisely because it is a small workshop.


In that sense, the quality is fundamentally different from that of products made in large factories.


This is a custom-ordered GIB model.


It is a 4-string PB model with a special color scheme.


The color is a GIB original metallic pink based on the Shinobi series.


While based on a bright burgundy color, the finish emphasizes the beautiful wood grain of the ash body.


Previously, it had a black pickguard, but this time it's tortoiseshell. As expected, it has a cool finish.


The body is made of Light Ash 2P.


This wood was carefully selected to achieve this special coloring.


It's very lightweight, which is another attractive feature.


The fingerboard is Rosewood, and the frets are Eternal Fret Warm.


These frets are made of stainless steel, specifically a softer compound.


They have a nickel-like feel and the eternal shine of stainless steel.


Regarding the finish, the body is finished with urethane, which combines hardness, thinness, and high transparency.


FCGR's urethane finish has a charm that lacquer lacks, and we have great confidence in its quality.


When you actually play it, there's no doubt about the quality of its texture, sound, and playability.


This proves that urethane finishes aren't necessarily a negative thing.


The neck has a lacquer finish, with a texture somewhere between gloss and satin.


This is a feel that vintage Fender enthusiasts will appreciate.


The pickups are FCGR's highly regarded original vintage models.


The bouncy, light response characteristic of lightweight ash wood is particularly appealing.


While this kind of feel in a PB is in demand, it's not very common.


It's trebly, yet has ample bass.


The high playability, the fundamental sound quality, and the vintage feel—the way FCGR balances these elements so well is, in my opinion, its greatest appeal.


A superb instrument, just as expected.


Highly recommended.



SPECS


BODY: L.W. ASH 2P

NECK: Maple 34 inch scale

GRIP: FCGR U

F.BOARD: Indian Rosewood 184R

NUT: Silicone Oiled Bone

FRET: Eternal Fret 014WARM / 20F

FINISH: C.O. Pink / MH

PICKUP: PB Vintage


Delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.

item.title: Psychederhythm Standard-J (Performance White) — $2,259.56
item.description:
$2,259.56 · Brand New · Ikebe Music

Our Business Hours is Mon to Fri / 11:00 to 18:00 JPN time
We will close Sat and Sun, so we will reply to inquiry that received weekend on next week.
Your understanding will be appreciated.

We are receiving the customer order with first comes first serves basis both on website and at real shop.
So occasionally it will be sold out while having email communication.
Please understand in advance.

Japanese consumption tax is not required for international shopping. However you may be required to pay duty, tax and import fee when receiving your items in your country. You must pay all these duty, tax and fee as receiver/importer and we do not cover any of them.

■Please note
The product description is an automatic translation of the Japanese description. Please contact us if you have any questions.

-----------------------------------

Standard model featuring "Sigil Pickups"

Psychederhythm is a brand that has gained extensive experience working with professional musicians, generously incorporating the knowledge and skills acquired there, and has received high praise from many professional musicians. This "STANDARD" model is a unique instrument that strongly reflects the brand's distinctive attention to detail, even within a simple JB style.

This instrument is a JB-type model with an alder body. Recently, Psyche has often used laminated specifications such as maple/alder, so this is a return to standard material specifications, which is likely due to considerations for matching with the pickups discussed later, and greatly contributes to a more vintage-like sound. The neck also uses orthodox materials, with a maple neck and rosewood fingerboard. The neck grip, with its natural fingerboard radius, has a very firm grip, while the matte finish makes it exceptionally easy to play. The fact that it uses a type with a strong hold rather than the extremely thin type seen in active models shows attention to detail. This, of course, has a big impact on the sound.

The guitar features "Vintage '60 J" pickups from the Canadian brand "Sigil Pickups." These are highly sensitive vintage-type pickups that faithfully reproduce the nuances of your fingertips. While this type of pickup often makes it difficult to balance each string, these "Sigil Pickups" are remarkably well-balanced, allowing for smooth playing with clear dynamics without any audible stress. The bridge is a "Gotoh 404BO," offering two options: top-load and string-through, allowing you to adjust the string tension to your preference. Furthermore, the custom-made neck joint plate with a heel cut ensures excellent playability even at the higher frets. The truss rod hole at the neck end makes neck adjustments, which previously required removing the neck and body, much easier, improving overall usability.

And, as always, the highly popular color scheme is now available in "Performance White." Combined with the aqua pearl pickguard, it creates a refreshing look. While adhering to the brand's classic sound and specifications, this model boasts an outstanding presence with its delicate and clear sound that is more vintage-inspired.

As always, this will be a very limited production run. Don't miss out!

Neck: Maple 1P
Fingerboard: Rosewood / 300R / Dots
Scale: Long
Fret: Vintage Type
Tuner: Gotoh / GB350
Nut: Bone
Body: Alder
Pickup (Neck): Sigil Pickups / Vintage '60 J
Pickup (Bridge): Sigil Pickups / Vintage '60 J
Control: 2 Volume / 1 Tone
Bridge: Gotoh / 404BO-4
Finish: All Urethane

Gig bag included

item.title: Fender American Elite Jazz - 2016 - Black — $2,504.34
item.description:
$2,504.34 · Excellent · Klundert Music

This stylish active USA Fender Elite Jazz Bass was built in 2016, but you can't tell by looking at it. In very good condition; only minor signs of use. Comes with a fresh set-up and new D'addario EXL170 strings. Comes complete with the in new condition Fender Deluxe ABS case and papers.

Filled to the brim with revolutionary innovations, the American Elite Jazz Bass is an active bass guitar for the modern bassist who demands advanced sound technology combined with timeless style and a fast, smooth playing experience. The versatile sound effortlessly suits any playing style. With plectrum, with fingers or slap-and-pop - while the look remains unmistakably Fender, with a fresh twist.

Featuring the exclusive fourth-generation Noiseless pickups: a vintage-like response with completely noise-free performance. These powerful pickups are powered by a robust 18-volt preamp that delivers extra power for even better signal quality. With deep, powerful tone, more headroom and less noise.

Designed for fast playing and effortless position changes, the neck has a compound profile with a 9.5"-14" compound-radius fingerboard, ideal for all playing styles. Beginning with a modern "C" shape at the new real bone nut, the profile gradually changes along the length of the neck to a modern "D" shape at the rounded neck foot, providing comfortable fret hand support. Posiflex graphite rods run the entire length of the neck, providing additional stability while preventing warping due to temperature and humidity variations.

The HiMass Vintage bridge increases the attack and resonance of notes for thunderous bass lines with tremendous punch and endless sustain, and allows for both top-load and string-through-body stringing. As a vintage detail, the neck pin adjustment screw has been moved to the end of the neck for easier access, making adjusting neck curvature a breeze.

This bass is packed with the iconic Fender aesthetic. From the ergonomic contours to the black chrome logo on the headstock, large pearlized position markers. The American Elite Jazz Bass is a bold bass for adventurous bassists who need a versatile tone instrument without concessions.

Includes an Elite Molded Case with close-fitting contours for added protection of your beloved instrument and TSA locks.

Features:

  • Alder Jazz Bass body
  • Two 4th Gen Noiseless Jazz Bass single-coil pickups
  • Built-in active 18-volt preamp for more headroom and less noise
  • Maple neck with compound profile; redesigned, ergonomic neck base
  • Maple fingerboard with 9.5"-14" compound radius
  • HiMass Vintage bridge
  • Includes Fender ABS Elite Molded Case
  • Fender model: 0197002706

This is a feel that vintage Fender enthusiasts will appreciate. What's particularly noteworthy is its superior playability and the sound that musicians truly desire from a PJ pickup.


The neck, meticulously crafted with stainless steel frets while respecting Fender's traditions, is truly top-notch.


While it doesn't have a particularly unique shape, that's precisely why its basic quality stands out.


The sharp response, speedy, and wide-range sound also contributes to its high playability.


A major issue with PJ basses is the unique sound when mixed, which PJ enthusiasts may have come to accept.


The strangely distorted phase nuance can sometimes be a negative.


Few brands offer a solution to this balance issue, but Freedom has one.


For the P pickup, one of the 3rd string pole pieces is made a dummy to adjust the balance between the number of turns and the wire length.


For the J pickup, it's shielded more highly than usual to maintain a refined balance when mixed.


This is extremely rational for PJ-style basses, where noise cancellation in the mix is ​​not possible.


The MIJ brand, a rare gem that consistently delivers high quality.


Please check it out in-store.


You'll understand why musicians simply love freedom when you play it.


●SPECS


BODY: L.W. ASH 2P

NECK: Maple 34 inch scale

GRIP: FCGR U

F. BOARD: Indian Rosewood 280R

NUT: Silicone Oiled Bone

FRET: Eternal Fret 014WARM / 20F

FINISH: C.O. Pink / MH

PICKUP: Original PB, Original JB


GIB's craftsmen will adjust it for easy playability before delivery.


Accessories: Gig bag, spec sheet


Text: Ryoma Terao


Inspection 담당: Higashie


Product Photos: Tei

Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. Excluding some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.


The warranty period is 3 months for used items and 1 year for new items.


Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:

item.title: 【used】Bacchus / WJB5-1DX-AC RSM/P PWH-MH 4.490kg【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $637
item.description:
$637 · Very Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Bacchus（バッカス）は長野を拠点とする日本のブランドです。


飛鳥工場という大型のギター工場を保有するディバイザー傘下のブランドで、工場が自ら手掛けるからこその質の高さは多くのミュージシャンに評価されています。


Bacchusには価格帯ごとに幾つかのシリーズがありますが、ユニバースシリーズは特に高いコストパフォーマンスを追及しています。


こちらのWJB-1DXは価格を抑えながらもプレイアビリティとサウンドにこだわったJBモデルです。


ボディはPoplarです。


ネックはRoasted Maple、指板には黒染めされたPurpleheartを採用。

Roasted Mapleは元はフィンランドの技術で、楽器への採用という意味では関西のブランドであるSagoがパイオニアです。


高温で処理することで水分を揮発させ、剛性を高めたとされる素材です。

この処理の中で狂いが出た木材は当然使用されません。

ふたつの意味で、クオリティの高いものに仕上がるわけです。


PU、プリアンプはオリジナルです。


鳴り方がこなれており、レンジが広くウォームなニュアンスも持ち合わせているため、サウンドはジューシーで幸福感のあるものに仕上がります。


初めての5弦ベースにも、サブ機としてもおすすめの一本です。


フレットの残りはおおよそ 90% ほど。

トラスロッドの状態は、良好です。

ネックの状態は、良好です。

ボディや塗装面は、細かなスクラッチ傷は見受けられますが、目立った傷はなく、綺麗な状態です。

電装系の状態は、良好です。

明確な改造点は見られませんでした。


コントロール : マスターボリューム、バランサー、トレブル、ベース

ナット幅 : 45.9mm

ブリッジ部弦間ピッチ : 18.0mm

スケール : 34Inch

製造年 : 不明

製造国 : CHINA


GIBの職人が演奏しやすく調整した上でお届けします。


付属品 : 純正ソフトケース


文章 : 寺尾竜馬


検品担当 : 平山

商品写真 : テイ

item.title: Ibanez SR5000MPW Prestige Custom Made MEC Natural Second Hand — $2,254.98
item.description:
$2,254.98 · Brand New · Rockland Music

The Ibanez SR5000MPW Prestige is an extremely rare bass that was built in Japan only from 1996 to 1998. It features an Ibanez Mono-Rail bridge with a D-tuner on the E string, allowing you to switch from standard to drop tuning with just one hand movement! It has also been retrofitted with active MEC pickups in P- and J-styles, delivering a particularly assertive and high-quality tone. The electronics have been upgraded with a variety of higher-quality components (which we’d be happy to explain in more detail upon request). With a 3-piece body made of maple and walnut, a 5-piece neck made of wenge and bubinga, and a wenge fingerboard, the SR5000MPW is crafted exclusively from top-tier woods.

Included are a case, the original gig bag, and the complete original electronics with poti knobs.

The instrument is in excellent condition and comes from a collection on behalf of a customer.

Since this item is being sold on behalf of a customer, no warranty or return can be offered. This item is subject to differential taxation pursuant to § 25a of the German Value-Added Tax Act (UStG).

item.title: Takamine Tb10 — $2,386.22
item.description:
$2,386.22 · Excellent · Brahms Music Shop

👌 EXCELLENT CONDITIONS
📦 ORIGINAL BOX INCLUDED
✅ FULLY WORKING / TESTED
🚛 SHIPPING COSTS TO BE MANAGED PROVIDE YOUR ADDRESS FOR A QUOTE
🚛 SPESE DI SPEDIZIONE DA CALCOLARE FORNISCI IL TUO INDIRIZZO PER UN PREVENTIVO
The TB10 bass is handcrafted in our pro series facility that has been building precision quality instruments over five decades.
A unique hybrid crossover bass guitar, it retains the 34” scale but the fretboard has the radius of an upright bass, which allows for bowing. It can be played as a regular bass guitar or as an upright with the tail pin extension peg. This fretless instrument produces a tone heavy and fundamental with the rich harmonics you would expect from an upright bass.
Includes Takamine’s Palathetic™ pickup, known in the industry as one of the most accurate and natural sounding acoustic/electric pickups. The electronic performance package is beyond state of the art with the Cool Tube® Preamp - the first and only tube preamp in an acoustic guitar.
Top Arched Spruce
Back Arched Maple
Sides Maple
Neck Maple
Finger Board Ebony
Nut Width 1.825" (46.35 mm)
Electronics CTP-2 Cool Tube™ Preamp System with 3-Band EQ, Auxiliary Input, Onboard Chromatic Tuner, and Palathetic™ Under-Saddle Pickup
Finish Red Stain

item.title: FENDER 75th Anniversary Player II Precision Bass RW Daphne Blue PREORDER — $998.34
item.description:
$998.34 · Brand New · Brahms Music Shop

BASSO ELETTRICO 4 CORDE DAPHNE BLUE
 
Il Fender 75th Anniversary Player II Precision Bass celebra una delle icone più importanti della storia della musica con una versione moderna, versatile e pronta per qualsiasi contesto. Caratterizzato da un corpo in ontano sagomato, offre il classico equilibrio timbrico Fender con bassi profondi, medi definiti e alte frequenze brillanti e a fuoco. Il manico in acero con profilo Modern "C", finitura satinata e bordi della tastiera arrotondati garantisce una suonabilità scorrevole e confortevole, ideale per lunghe sessioni in studio o dal vivo, mentre la tastiera in palissandro con raggio da 9,5" e 20 tasti Medium Jumbo assicura una risposta precisa e un feeling moderno senza rinunciare al carattere tradizionale del Precision Bass. Il singolo pickup Player Series Alnico 5 Split Single-Coil offre il celebre timbro potente e definito che ha reso questo strumento amatissimo negli anni, con bassi autorevoli, medi musicali e una presenza capace di adattarsi a qualsiasi genere musicale. Il ponte a 4 sellette regolabili con sellette in acciaio Single-Groove Barrel e le meccaniche open-gear garantiscono stabilità d'accordatura e intonazione accurata, trasmettendo inoltre le vibrazioni in modo ottimale. Disponibile con diverse finiture dedicate esclusivamente al 75° anniversario Fender, questo strumento combina tradizione e innovazione in un basso progettato per accompagnare il musicista moderno in ogni situazione professionale.

item.title: FENDER Squier Paranormal Precision Bass Thinline SJ 3-Color Sunburst PREORDER — $508.86
item.description:
$508.86 · Brand New · Brahms Music Shop

BASSO SEMIACUSTICO A 4 CORDE
Lo Squier Paranormal Precision Bass Thinline SJ è un basso progettato per unire alla perfezione la tradizione dei primi bassi Fender a una configurazione costruttiva e sonora del tutto originale, dando vita a uno strumento capace di distinguersi per personalità, comfort e versatilità. Il corpo semi-hollow Thinline in Nyatoh dona una straordinaria risonanza acustica, alleggerendo inoltre il peso complessivo e restituendo una risposta più aperta e dinamica, ideale sia sul palco sia in studio. Il manico in acero con profilo "C", la tastiera in acero con raggio da 9.5" e i tasti Narrow Tall assicurano una suonabilità moderna e confortevole, mentre il ponte vintage a quattro sellette scanalate e le meccaniche open-gear in stile classico garantiscono massima stabilità d'accordatura e un feeling autentico. L'inedita configurazione SJ, che abbina un pickup single-coil in stile '51 Precision Bass progettato da Fender a un pickup single-coil Jazz Bass, offre un'ampia tavolozza timbrica che spazia dai bassi pieni e corposi tipici del Precision fino alla definizione brillante e articolata del Jazz Bass. Il selettore a tre posizioni permette di richiamare rapidamente ciascun pickup singolarmente oppure la loro combinazione, consentendo di adattare con naturalezza lo strumento a qualsiasi contesto musicale. Con il suo look ispirato al Precision Bass del 1951 e una costruzione ricca di personalità, questo modello rappresenta una proposta ideale per chi desidera un basso dal carattere vintage ma con una voce estremamente versatile.

Un tributo al decennio che ha reso il P Bass® un'icona, il Precision Bass® Classic Vibe ‘60s incarna l'estetica dell'originale e produce un suono potente, grazie al suo pickup split-coil in alnico progettato da Fender. item.title: Ibanez Btb805 Ms Fnl — $1,222.69
item.description:
$1,222.69 · Brand New · Brahms Music Shop

BASSO ELETTRICO 5 CORDE MULTI SCALA FLORID NATURAL LOW GLOSS
L’Ibanez BTB805MS è un basso elettrico a cinque corde di fascia professionale progettato per offrire massima definizione sulle basse frequenze, ampia dinamica e una risposta estremamente controllata anche con le accordature più estreme. Il corpo con top in radica di pioppo, abbinato ad ali in okoume e frassino, garantisce un equilibrio ideale tra attacco, profondità e sustain, valorizzando ogni minima sfumatura timbrica. La costruzione neck-through assicura una trasmissione delle vibrazioni ottimale e una sensazione di suonabilità uniforme lungo tutta la tastiera. Il manico a cinque pezzi in acero e noce, rinforzato con barre in grafite, offre stabilità strutturale elevata e precisione anche sotto forte tensione, mentre la tastiera in Panga Panga con binding contribuisce a un attacco deciso e a una definizione chiara delle note. La multiscala da 37" a 35" migliora sensibilmente la resa delle corde gravi, mantenendo naturalezza sulle corde acute. I pickup passivi Ibanez T1 forniscono un suono potente, articolato e ricco di dettaglio, gestito da un’elettronica Ibanez Custom a 3 bande con bypass EQ e selettore delle frequenze medie per un controllo timbrico avanzato e versatile. Il ponte MR5S con spaziatura regolabile trasmette le vibrazioni in modo ottimale e completa uno strumento pensato per assicurare performance professionali, fornito completo di custodia rigida per garantire una protezione ottimale durante il trasporto.

item.title: SQUIER Mini Precision Bass LRL 2C Sunburst — $188.65
item.description:
$188.65 · Brand New · Brahms Music Shop

MINI BASSO ELETTRICO 4 CORDE 2 COLOR SUNBURST
Lo Squier Mini Precision Bass è un basso elettrico compatto progettato per offrire il classico carattere Precision in un formato ridotto, leggero e straordinariamente confortevole. Pensato per giovani musicisti che desiderano avvicinarsi al basso o per bassisti che cercano uno strumento da viaggio pratico e affidabile, questo modello combina dimensioni contenute con il timbro pieno e riconoscibile della tradizione Fender. Il corpo in pioppo, sottile e ben bilanciato, assicura un peso contenuto e una buona risonanza, rendendo lo strumento comodo anche per sessioni prolungate. Il manico in acero con profilo a “C” e scala corta da 28,6" favorisce una tensione delle corde più morbida e una suonabilità immediata, ideale per mani piccole o per chi predilige un tocco più leggero. La tastiera in alloro indiano con raggio da 9,5" offre una superficie confortevole e stabile, adatta sia alle linee di basso tradizionali sia a tecniche espressive più moderne. Il pickup split single coil in stile Precision garantisce un suono corposo, definito e ricco di punch, perfetto per sostenere il mix con basse frequenze solide e medie ben presenti. L’elettronica semplice con controlli di volume e tono consente una gestione immediata e precisa del suono, mentre il ponte vintage a quattro sellette e le meccaniche sigillate assicurano una stabilità di accordatura ottimale. Lo Squier Mini Precision Bass rappresenta una soluzione compatta ma completa, capace di unire comfort, versatilità e identità sonora.

item.title: Sadowsky MetroExpress JJ Bass 5 21 Olimpic White — $1,120.71
item.description:
$1,120.71 · Brand New · Brahms Music Shop

Descrizione
L’obiettivo di Roger Sadowsky è sempre stato quello di migliorare ulteriormente il design di un basso già di grande successo apportando una serie di miglioramenti dettagliati. Insieme all’elettronica, da lui stesso sviluppata, è riuscito ad elevare il noto suono J-bass ad un nuovo livello, tanto che oggi si può parlare di un tipico timbro Sadowsky: mai aspro o stridulo, con suoni forti, potenti ma bassi mai fangosi, con medie presenti, ma non troppo aggressive, e alti dolci e ariosi. Tutte le caratteristiche di questo suono di basso moderno si possono trovare anche nei bassi Vintage JJ 21 tasti della serie MetroExpress. Tutti i bassi sono leggeri con peso massimo di 4,3kg. Una buona scelta per i bassisti che cercano una soluzione leggera per il palco oltre ad un suono di basso moderno.

item.title: MARCUS MILLER Z7-5 3-Tone Sunburst — $511.84
item.description:
$511.84 · Mint · Brahms Music Shop

👌 MINT CONDITIONS
🎸 REMOVABLE FRET MARKERS APPLLIED
✅ FULLY WORKING / TESTED
 
BASSO ELETTRICO 5 CORDE SUNBURST 3-COLORI
Il Sire Marcus Miller Z7 rappresenta una versione ad alte prestazioni del basso probabilmente più iconico della fine degli anni '70, preferito tra gli slapper, il fingerstyle e i rocker. Innanzitutto, il ponte in stile Premium MM del corpo in ontano, il battipenna ovale, la piastra di controllo curva e il pickup humbucker Premium MM con sfumature alte che brillano di una lucentezza pungente.
Ma questo basso non è un semplice clone: ​​un pickup Premium Split Jazz posizionato al manico sblocca un suono caldo, ricco e ben definito in stile single coil, ulteriormente elevato con un preamplificatore attivo flessibile Marcus Heritage-3. Hai anche un comodo manico in acero duro a forma di "C", ed è tutto rifinito con l'elegante trattamento Edgeless del bordo dei tasti Sire e 22 tasti medium-jumbo in acciaio inossidabile.
Ispirato al passato ma dotato di una serie di aggiornamenti moderni, l'immensamente versatile Sire Marcus Miller Z7 rappresenta una soluzione sonora onnicomprensiva per i bassisti che saltano tra i generi sul palco o in studio.

item.title: 1974 Greco PB-750 Deluxe Natural w/ Gigbag | Tetsu Yamauchi Signature Model — $1,150
item.description:
$1,150 · Excellent · 古董 VINTAGE GUTING 亭

The Greco PB-750 (often designated as PB-750DX) is a premium, "Lawsuit Era" bass guitar produced in Japan during the 1970s, primarily at the legendary Matsumoku factory.

Priced at 75,000 Yen at launch, it sat at the top of Greco's early-to-mid '70s bass lineup.

It is highly regarded as Greco's first official artist model, designed as a signature bass for famed Japanese bassist Tetsu Yamauchi (of Free and Faces).


Key Specifications

  • Body Build : Typically made of solid, heavy Sen (Japanese Ash) configured in a multi-piece or "pancake" style construction.
  • Neck : One-piece bolt-on maple neck. While styled as a Precision Bass, many iterations feature a narrow 38.1mm (1.5") nut width similar to a Fender Jazz Bass profile.
  • Pickup Configuration : A unique PJ or Humbucker layout built by Maxon. It pairs a standard P-bass split-coil pickup (positioned closer to the neck than typical Fenders) with a J-style single coil or double pole-piece bass humbucker at the bridge.
  • Weight : Known for being incredibly dense and heavy, 5.15 kg

Character & ToneBecause of the heavy Ash body, the PB-750 provides massive sustain and natural resonance.

The non-standard pickup spacing delivers a throaty, mid-centric punch when using the front pickup, combined with a smooth, biting bridge tone.

It is a highly collectible vintage instrument praised for build quality that rivals the American Fender models it replicated.


.


24/7 humidity control.

Shipping with gigbag, extra bubble wrap and box from Taiwan.

Local pickup available.


Full setup, clean and maintenance by a professional luthier in Taiwan.

Feel free to make an offer. Sold as-described, no returns.

Thank you for shopping with VINTAGE GUTING.

item.title: Fender USA 2023 American Ultra Precision Bass — $1,413.55
item.description:
$1,413.55 · Very Good · TC GAKKI

Welcome to TC Gakki! All photos are of the item for sale. Please note they are for sale in our store and may sell out. Thank you for looking! Feel free to ask any questions!

Product Details
________________________________

The flagship model of modern Fender, fulfilling every desire!

Following the evolution of the American Deluxe and American Elite, the Fender USA Modern Series continues with the American Ultra, which debuted in 2019 as its legitimate successor.

The neck shape features a "Modern "D"" profile. The fingerboard has a "compound radius (10"-14")" specification, which flattens towards the higher positions, balancing ease of grip in the lower positions with smooth fingering in the higher positions. A tapered heel cut at the joint makes accessing the higher positions easy.

The pickups are Ultra Noiseless Vintage in a PJ configuration, designed to minimize noise. It blends the sound of a Precision Bass with the crispness of a Jazz Bass in a well-balanced way.

It features switchable active/passive modes and supports 3-band EQ (in active mode) equalization via a built-in 18V-powered preamp. Even when switched to passive, it outputs a natural, passive Precision Bass tone.

It's impressive how it delivers a powerful, wide-ranging sound while maintaining a cohesive tone.
For example, when you want to produce a more traditional Precision Bass sound by using only the front pickup, you can fine-tune the EQ to achieve that level of versatility. Its practicality and ability to address even the smallest details are major strengths.

This bass fulfills the desire to "maintain the versatility and playability of a Jazz Bass while adding the thickness of a Precision Bass!"

【SPEC】
BODY: Alder
NECK: Maple
FINGERBOARD: Rosewood
P.U: Ultra Noiseless Vintage P/J
CONTROL: Vol/Bal/3Band EQ/Passive Tone/(Active/Passive)SW

SCALE: 34”
NUT WIDTH: 41.5mm
w/Hardcase

item.title: Fender Japan 1997-2000 JB62-58 — $565.42
item.description:
$565.42 · Very Good · TC GAKKI

Welcome to TC Gakki! All photos are of the item for sale. Please note they are for sale in our store and may sell out. Thank you for looking! Feel free to ask any questions!

Product Details
________________________________

The Fender Japan JB62, a true classic!

Fender Japan was established in 1982. Due to a change in distributors, the Fender Japan name disappeared in 2015.

While Fender continues to manufacture high-quality instruments under its MIJ (Made In Japan) series, Fender Japan instruments have gained high acclaim as "Japanese Vintage" instruments and are popular both domestically and internationally.

This model is a reproduction of the 1962 Jazz Bass. It features a slab rosewood fingerboard and a 3-knob control configuration (2 volume, 1 tone).

With its characteristic Jazz Bass-like, sustained midrange, it's versatile enough to handle a wide range of genres. This particular instrument has a relatively warm tone!
